heading: Testimonials and Ratings
note: Testimonials are hidden until real client words are added. To show one: fill in the quote and name, set the source, then set BOTH 'published' AND 'permissionApproved' to true (only after the client has agreed). Never invent quotes, names, star ratings or dates — see REVIEWS_AND_TESTIMONIALS_GUIDE.md.

items.quote: Photography can feel so awkward but Shaney knows how to balance keeping the photography professional and fit for purpose while making the environment fun and relaxing at the shoot. We love our photos and have used them on our website, customer presentations and LinkedIn content
items.name: EdelSenz
